title: Level 247
wikitext:
{{New Theme}}{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 247: "Song of The Flowers"}} __NOTOC__ {{Background|file=Levell.jpg}}
I wasn't sure whether being deaf was an advantage or a disadvantage when I was walking in the middle of the field. Laura frowned, clearly uncomfortable as she walked in front of me. I put my two palms together and waved my hand in her direction. We have been using this sign language since we were young. "What's the problem?" Laura turned back towards me, tapped her ear three times with two fingers, then raised her hand. "The sounds...are too loud." We spent some time strolling through the misted flower field. I scanned my surroundings for potential hazards, but nothing caught my eye. We sat down on the ground at an area with less flowers since we were tired of strolling across the endless field of flowers. Endless. That was the problem, things without end are no good. That's always been the problem here, from the beginning: Uncertainty. I clutched my diary tightly, hoping nothing bad would happen to us. I looked at Laura and saw that she had her hands to her ears. Was the noise that loud? I touched her arm to get her attention, but she had her eyes tightly shut and her hands pressed to her ears. I gave her a gentle pat on the hair, trying to comfort her. I offered her the pen in case she wanted to write in the diary, but she wasn't paying attention. After a while, Laura slowly lay down on the floor. She opened her eyes and looked at me. She took her hands away from her ears and said my name using our sign language: "Daphne..." But then,she closed her eyes again. Her ears were still covered by her hands, it looked like she was asleep. "No...Laura...look at me, please!" I said to myself, hoping her to wake up. I tried to wake her up for a while, but my efforts seemed to be in vain. I heard a sound that made no sense but echoed in my mind. I heard a sound. But... How?
Level 247: "Song of The Flowers"
{{Quote|''All I can think about that field is the smell of flowers and...the sounds.''|Wanderer}}
{{Alt Class|ent=0|no=247|ext=4|env=4}}
'''Level 247''' is the 248th level of the Backrooms.
==
Description
== {{Underline|FFFFFF}} {{Blurimage|file=Levelll.jpg|caption=A distant photo of small lakes.|align=left}} Level 247, also known as Song of The Flowers, is characterized by its overall minimal tree cover and pale flower appearance. During the day or night, the air at the level is foggy and the sky is unclear. Although flowers cover it most of the time, at this level trees or small lakes can occasionally be glimpsed. There are claims that the water in these lakes is medicinal, although they are unconfirmed. Although not proved, the level appears to be endlessly vast. The level is not suitable for life as there is no food source on it and the wanderers are very likely, if not guaranteed, to lose their sanity as time passes. The main reason for this is thought to be the sound regularly heard at the level. It is never advisable to stay at the level for a long time, as these sounds will lead healthy people into a forced sleep and unconsciousness. {{Blurimage|file=Level....jpg|caption=A picture of the house.}} The level contains a house positioned inside a limited area where the weather is not consistently misty. This 2-storey house made of wood is depicted as the most reliable way to survive on the level. As you get closer to home, the foggy air around you will slowly disappear and the regular sound waves will start to change. The house has the overall appearance of an old wooden house. It has 7 rooms, and it is known that 1 of them is locked. There are various furniture and broken technological devices in the unlocked rooms. No food resources were found. When one enters this house, the frequency of the sound heard on the level regularly changes, which is known to help wanderers to focus. It is thought that sound waves with frequencies higher than 40 hertz are responsible for maintaining intentional connections between neurons. This way, wanderers entering the house will be able to rest here for a while and trying to find their way out will be easier.
===
Anomalies
=== {{Underline|999999}} The research about the sounds at ''Level 247'' done by Dr. Vernal is given. '''"The most prevalent complaint among wanderers who leave the level after experiencing it is the unpleasant noise. I thought it was the frequency range, but it seems it's more complicated than that.''' '''Sound is periodic pressure changes that can be perceived by the hearing organs of living things. In the physical dimension, sound is a simple mechanical irregularity that occurs in solid, liquid or gaseous media. It is the result of the vibration of molecules in a substance.''' '''Sound is created by vibration, converting vibration into energy. The strength of sound is called loudness and is measured in decibels (dB).''' '''The dynamic range heard by a healthy person is 0-140 dB. Sounds starting at 0 dB increase in loudness as they get higher. However, sounds above 140 dB are considered uncomfortable for healthy individuals. But at this level, sounds above 140 decibels, instead of disturbing people, have an effect like the Delta Frequency (4 hertz), thus forcing people's minds to enter a state of sleep .I have not yet been able to determine the reason for this, but I think that the vibration created by sound waves here is different from that of known material media.''' '''And when the intensity of these vibrations exceeds a certain range, it has been found that it unblocks people who are deaf due to blockage of the external auditory canal and enables them to hear sounds. Although the reason is still unknown, it is seen as a positive development related to health."'''
==
Entities
== {{Underline|FFFFFF}} There are no proven entities on the level. However, some wanderers have suggested that the sounds at the level may be caused by an entity.
==
Colonies and Outposts
== {{Underline|FFFFFF}} Due to the conditions of the level, colonies and outposts cannot be established.
==
Found Records
== {{Underline|FFFFFF}}
|-| A voice recorder found in the house = ''"Wh-what? Is this a house? I'm quite sleepy... Maybe we can rest. But, uh.. Actually, I can't say that I am not scared."'' ''"We have to be careful. It's quite different here than the outside."'' ''"Indeed. You hear? Sounds... They are changed. It feels more...clear?"'' ''"I hope it's a good thing. Shall we check around?"'' ''"Yes. Look at those...There are numbers on the doors. Does that mean anything?"'' ''"Probably yes."'' ''(some footsteps and door sounds are heard)'' ''"Only Room 3 is locked. There must be a reason for this."'' ''"Let's check the other ones. Maybe we can find a key?"'' ''"Actually, I was quite tired, but... I feel refreshed. Let's see if we can find the key."'' |-| A note found in flower field =
This water is the only thing that can relieve my tiredness. With the last of my strength I managed to throw myself on the edge of this lake. I'm lucky I did that, because I felt like I was going to fall asleep at any moment. As the tiredness fades, I look around. It's foggy, so I can't see far, I can only look around me. The flowers are so beautiful, and they smell so good. I don't know why, but I don't hear the sound as strongly as I used to. Maybe it's the water. But maybe... Maybe I am not able to hear the sound anymore.
==
Entrances and Exits
== {{Underline|FFFFFF}} ===Entrances=== {{Underline|999999}} *In Plains Area of [[Level 246]], level may change to this level for unknown reasons. *Falling asleep in a garden in [[Level 248]] may lead you here. ===Exits=== {{Underline|999999}} *It is impossible to get out of the level after a long stay under the influence of sounds and after falling asleep. The only known way out is to find the house without being under the influence of the sounds for too long. Finding the key in this house and entering a "Room 3" will take you to [[Level 181]]
